title: Pika PvP
description:
PikaPvP shows a customizable Target HUD with key PvP stats (HP, distance/ping/LOS, weapon, armor, offhand, effects).
It helps you react faster in fights and works anywhere since it’s client-side.
body:
![PVP Main Thumb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/356c5e494a0966dfe3a46a4e51d695ce3e169fdf.png)

# PikaPvP — Client-Side Target HUD (Fabric + Forge)

**PikaPvP** adds a clean, lightweight **Target HUD** for PvP. It displays key combat info for the player you’re aiming at — **no server plugin required**.

**Client-side only.** It’s an overlay that organizes information your client can already access.
**No gameplay changes.** It doesn’t modify mechanics like damage, reach, speed, or packets.

---

## Features

* **Target + Health HUD** (clear, readable, color-coded)
* Optional details:

  * **Absorption**
  * **Weapon info** (damage, cooldown, durability)
  * **Distance / Ping / Line of Sight**
  * **Movement speed multiplier**
  * **Armor stats** (armor, toughness, knockback resistance)
  * **Offhand detection** (Totem / Shield) + **Blocking**
  * **Armor pieces + durability**
  * **Status effects** (amplifier + timer, with max-limit to stay clean)

---

## Smart Targeting (stable in fights)

* Prioritizes your **crosshair target**
* Supports aim-tolerance for fast movement
* **Sticky targeting** reduces flicker
* **Stale timer** prevents outdated HUD info lingering

---

## Customization

![Settings Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f5b308e55a0bdef56c6be54f6749453e8f92f3b_0.webp)

* Toggle sections on/off (minimal → full tactical)
* Compact mode
* HUD position (anchors + offsets + screen clamping)
* Visual styling (opacity, padding, spacing)
* Behavior tuning (range, tolerance, sticky/stale ticks)

**Config:** `config/pikapvp.json`

---

## Controls

* **O** — Open HUD Settings
* **H** — Toggle HUD

Also adds a **“PikaPvP HUD”** button to the **Pause Menu** and **Options Menu**.
**ModMenu supported** (optional, Fabric).

---

## Requirements

**Minecraft:** 1.21.x (>= 1.21.8, < 1.22)
**Java:** 21+

### Fabric

* Fabric Loader **>= 0.15.0**
* **Fabric API** required
* ModMenu optional

### Forge

* Forge (JavaFML) **58+**
* No extra dependencies beyond Forge

---

## Server Notes

Some servers may restrict what clients can see (e.g., other players’ health). In those cases, available HUD details depend on server rules — the mod remains useful for things like distance/ping/LOS/offhand/armor/effects where permitted.

---
